steps.name: code_changes
steps.acceptance: Causal mask bug fixed in src/model.py (strictly causal). PAD_TOKEN_IDX=4 added to src/data.py. Query zeroing added to TarFlowBlock. Gaussian noise function added to src/data.py. n_atom_types=5 when use_pad_token=True. Config integration in src/train.py. All unit tests pass.

steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Diagnostic run (500 steps, ethanol, Config A + causal mask fix + no clamping). Report written to reports/diagnostic_report.md. Root cause confirmed: log_det does NOT explode without clamping (log_det/dof < 5.0 by step 100).

steps.name: plan
steps.acceptance: OPTIMIZE Plan Sub-report approved by Postdoc. Written to reports/plan_report.md.

steps.name: angle_sanity_val
steps.acceptance: 4-config 2x2 factorial ablation (1000 steps each, ethanol). Any config achieves VF > 0.40 on ethanol. Results in angles/sanity/val/.

steps.name: angle_sanity_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep on best SANITY config. Best config selected. Results in angles/sanity/sweep/.

steps.name: angle_sanity_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run on best SANITY config (all 8 molecules). VF >= 0.5 on >= 4/8 molecules. Results in angles/sanity/full/.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_val
steps.acceptance: HEURISTICS validation run (if SANITY shows promise but below target). Masked LayerNorm or zero PAD embedding. Results in angles/heuristics/val/.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep on HEURISTICS config if val is promising.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run on best HEURISTICS config.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.acceptance: SCALE validation run (d_model=256, n_blocks=12, 50k steps) if needed.

steps.name: angle_scale_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep on SCALE config if val is promising.

steps.name: angle_scale_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run on best SCALE config.

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice.

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final Experiment Report written to reports/final_report.md.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_005; pre-merge checks pass.
